ModMetadata.Name: Marky's Suit Drink System
ModMetadata.Author: Marky
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Marky's Suit Drink System[/h1] [b]WARNING:[/b] This is a [url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad] StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod[/url]. It requires BepInEx to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin.
[h3]Features[/h3] [list] [*]Drink directly in your spacesuit using a special button in the menu. Water will be drawn from the water tank installed in a special slot. [/list]
[url=https://github.com/Marky-S/MarkysSuitDrinkSystem] Source Code [/url]
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Marky's Suit Drink System WARNING: This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires BepInEx to be installed. Drink directly in your spacesuit using a special button in the menu. Water will be drawn from the water tank installed in a special slot Source Code: https://github.com/Marky-S/MarkysSuitDrinkSystem
